topics.title: American Idol Voting Conspiracy Theories
topics.summary: The show explores allegations that producers manipulated voting results for contestant Sanjaya and discusses the historical land deals involving Manhattan.

topics.title: Hostility Over Voting Allegations
topics.summary: The studio features a heated exchange regarding accusations of dishonesty and personal behavior involving a former contestant's voting habits.

topics.title: American Idol and Radio Industry Trends
topics.summary: The show features a heated debate over American Idol voting integrity, interactions with callers regarding the program, and a discussion on the decline of terrestrial radio in favor of satellite broadcasting.

topics.title: Gary's Dinner Party and Impersonations
topics.summary: The studio discusses Gary's upcoming dinner party, the dynamics of office invitations, and various impressions made on the show.

topics.title: Rutgers Basketball Team Comparison
topics.summary: The studio discusses a humorous comparison between the Rutgers team and the Toronto Raptors during a rant.

topics.title: Nikola Tesla and Local Guest
topics.summary: The studio features a guest who claims to be channeling Nikola Tesla while discussing his personal life, creative pursuits, and beliefs regarding Riley Martin.

topics.title: Mental Health and Alien Theories
topics.summary: The show features a guest named Dennis who discusses his experiences with psychiatric treatment, his belief in extraterrestrials, and the challenges of maintaining employment while navigating unconventional beliefs.

topics.title: Blake and Emily's Encounter
topics.summary: The studio explores a caller's story about his sexual encounter with a woman he met at a movie theater.

topics.title: Relationship Dynamics and Sexual Performance
topics.summary: The studio features a candid discussion regarding past relationships, sexual performance claims between former partners, and the impact of personal choices on romantic dynamics.

topics.title: Tabitha Stevens Interview
topics.summary: The show features a candid and sexually explicit interview with adult film star Tabitha Stevens regarding her career, personal life, and interactions with various industry figures.

topics.title: The Gossip Game and Artie's Absence
topics.summary: The studio plays a game to identify fake celebrity stories while discussing the whereabouts of a missing staff member who experienced a medical episode on an escalator.

topics.title: Artie's French Toast and Health Concerns
topics.summary: The studio monitors Artie as he consumes a large amount of syrup-soaked French toast while the hosts joke about his health, potential diabetes, and the difficulty of cutting through the bread with a plastic fork.

topics.title: Virginia Tech Shooting Investigation
topics.summary: The studio discusses the investigation into the Virginia Tech shooting, including the shooter's suicide tape, his history of mental health concerns, and the failure of authorities to intervene before the tragedy.

topics.title: Current Events and Entertainment News
topics.summary: The studio covers a variety of topics including the recovery of students injured in a shooting, a trial involving allegations of domestic abuse, Supreme Court rulings on abortion, and updates on American Idol contestants.
